task.title: Copying a subproject
task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to copy a subproject.

step.cmd: Select the subproject that you want to copy. Right-click the subproject and select Copy.
Locate and select the destination project.
step.info: You can copy a subproject into the same project or into a different project.

step.cmd: Right-click the destination project and select Paste.
step.stepresult: The new subproject is created in the destination project with the same name and same properties. If you copy a subproject into the same project, prompts you to rename the copy.
